data.title: Litecoin Surges 20% in V-Shaped Recovery, Bulls Eye $300
data.description:
Litecoin (LTC) has been on a remarkable rally, bucking the trend of a broader crypto market crash. The altcoin demonstrated a V-shaped recovery, surging by 20% after dropping to $106 on Feb. 25. After a brief decline below the 50-day and 100-day exponential moving averages (EMAs), Litecoin has regained a bullish position and is currently outperforming most assets in the crypto market.

Litecoin's current performance suggests an asymmetric rally compared to the wider crypto market. Data indicates a clear trend where LTC's open interest has consistently peaked at $140. During the recent correction, LTC's open interest dropped from $885 million to $525 million, a 40% decline between Feb. 20 and Feb. 26. However, a majority of the decline occurred within the first three days, and the open interest remained relatively flat during LTC's drawdown in the past two days.

In the past 24 hours, a flash open interest spike of 10% was observed alongside a price rise, which might imply fresh long positions from traders. The rise in the funding rate further confirmed that more longs were currently active than shorts. This positive sentiment was echoed by Tyler, an anonymous crypto trader, who described Litecoin as having "one of the best charts in crypto."

Analysts have been bullish on Litecoin's prospects. Poseidon, a crypto analyst, predicted that Litecoin is targeting a new all-time high at $300. Mihir, a technical analyst, believed the long-term target could be even higher, suggesting that if Litecoin breaks above $250, a $1,000 target is feasible.

However, overhead resistance at $140 remains a challenge for Litecoin. As illustrated in the chart below, Litecoin's weekly price action is exhibiting strength, and a candle close above $133 would mark its highest level since January 2022. To invalidate its resistance range, ltc needs a weekly close above $133, with supply-side liquidity available on the upside.

data.title: Panshibi Emerges as New Hope Amidst Dogecoin and Shiba Inu Struggles
data.description:
Dogecoin Price Prediction: Will DOGE Hit $1 In 2025? Panshibi Gains Traction Among Crypto Investors Worldwide

Dogecoin and Shiba Inu, two prominent meme coins, have been facing headwinds in recent weeks, with investors seeking refuge in more stable projects. Despite the bearish market conditions, some investors remain hopeful about a potential bullish scenario for Dogecoin in the near term. However, the long-standing dream of Dogecoin reaching the $1 mark appears to be out of reach this year.

Dogecoin's price prediction for March suggests a downward trend, with the token breaking below key support levels and consolidating losses. Experts anticipate further losses if Dogecoin trades below its crucial support level of $0.195. Despite the short-term bearish outlook, long-term price predictions for Dogecoin remain optimistic.

Shiba Inu, another popular meme token, has also been struggling to regain momentum. The token has plunged into a bearish spiral, testing buyers' appetite at $0.000011, a 19% decrease from its current price. This has raised concerns among investors who had anticipated renewed momentum for Shiba Inu and Dogecoin in March.

Amidst the struggles of Dogecoin and Shiba Inu, a new meme coin, Panshibi, has been gaining traction and support from millions of fans and investors worldwide. Panshibi, with its Panda mascot inspired by Asian culture, aims to give everyday people a voice against financial elites while providing them with an opportunity to build wealth.

Panshibi offers investors staking benefits, with up to 1200% APY per annum for staking SHIBI tokens for a year. The project's ongoing ICO has raised over $1.15M in investor crowdfunding, indicating growing interest and bullish potential. Analysts believe that innovative projects like Panshibi can revitalize the saturated market of dog-themed meme tokens and set it on a trajectory for significant growth.

Join the Panshibi presale today for $0.005 per token. For more information, visit the official website, Telegram, or Twitter.

data.title: Sarepta Therapeutics: Strong Q4 Earnings Overshadowed by Guidance Miss
data.description:
Shares of sarepta therapeutics (SRPT) dropped 6% in after-hours trading on Monday, despite reporting strong fourth-quarter earnings and sales that beat analyst expectations. The biotechnology company's stock price decline can be attributed to a guidance miss and concerns about the growth rate of its gene therapy, ELEVIDYS.



Sarepta Therapeutics, a leader in precision genetic medicine for rare diseases, reported GAAP and non-GAAP net income of $159.0 million and $206.0 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, respectively. Net product revenues for the quarter totaled $638.2 million, a 75% increase over the same quarter of the prior year. ELEVIDYS, the company's gene therapy for Duchenne muscular dystrophy, contributed $384.2 million to the quarter's net product revenue, representing a 75% increase over the same quarter of the prior year.



Despite the strong earnings and sales performance, Sarepta's stock price declined in after-hours trading due to a guidance miss and concerns about the growth rate of ELEVIDYS. The company projected net product revenue of $2.9 billion to $3.1 billion for the full year 2025, which was below the consensus estimate of $3.2 billion. Additionally, the projected 162% year-over-year growth for ELEVIDYS in 2025 was lower than the 200% growth rate in 2024, raising concerns about the drug's long-term growth prospects.

Analysts' earnings estimates and price targets for sarepta Therapeutics have been increasing, indicating a positive outlook on the company's financial performance. However, the company's guidance miss and the slower growth rate for ELEVIDYS may lead to a reassessment of these estimates and targets. The strong revenue growth and positive developments in the company's pipeline, such as the successful EMBARK study and the licensing agreement with Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals, have contributed to the analysts' optimism. However, the after-hours decline in Sarepta's stock price suggests that investors may be more cautious about the company's future prospects.

In conclusion, Sarepta Therapeutics reported strong fourth-quarter earnings and sales, but the after-hours decline in the company's stock price highlights the importance of meeting analyst expectations and addressing investor concerns about the growth rate of ELEVIDYS. As the company continues to advance its pipeline and expand its product portfolio, investors will be watching closely to see if Sarepta can regain momentum and deliver on its growth potential.

data.title: Snowflake Shares Soar 9.33%: Seeking Alpha's Bullish Boost
Nvidia's Q1 2025 Earnings: A Record Quarter and a Glimpse into the Future of AI
data.description:
Nvidia's Q1 2025 earnings report has sparked renewed optimism in the tech sector, with investors eagerly awaiting the company's next moves. The chipmaker reported record revenue and earnings, surpassing analyst expectations and setting the stage for a potential turnaround in the 'Magnificent Seven' tech stocks. Here's a closer look at Nvidia's impressive results and the implications for the broader tech market.

Record Revenue and Earnings
Nvidia's Q1 2025 revenue reached a record $26.0 billion, up 18% from the last quarter and 262% year-over-year. The company's net income also soared, up 21% sequentially and 628% year-over-year, to $14.88 billion. Earnings per share (EPS) came in at $5.98, up 21% sequentially and 629% year-over-year. These impressive results reflect Nvidia's strong performance across its segments, particularly in data center and AI.

Data Center and AI Growth
Nvidia's data center segment continued its impressive growth trajectory, with revenue reaching a record $22.6 billion, up 23% from the previous quarter and 427% year-over-year. This growth was driven by strong demand for the company's Hopper GPU computing platform, which is widely used for AI applications. The segment's growth was broad-based, with all customer types contributing to the strong performance.

AI Adoption and Opportunities
The quarter saw accelerating demand for generative AI training and inference on the Hopper platform. Beyond cloud service providers, generative AI expanded to consumer internet companies, enterprise, sovereign AI, automotive, and healthcare customers, creating multiple multibillion-dollar vertical markets. Nvidia's AI solutions are increasingly being adopted by businesses seeking to leverage AI for various applications, driving strong demand for the company's products.

Automotive and Enterprise Growth
Nvidia supported Tesla's expansion of their training AI cluster to 35,000 H100 GPUs, enabling the breakthrough performance of FSD version 12. The automotive industry is expected to be Nvidia's largest enterprise vertical within Data Center this year, driving a multibillion-dollar revenue opportunity across on-prem data centers and RTX AI PCs.

Looking Ahead
Nvidia's impressive Q1 2025 results have set the stage for a potential turnaround in the 'Magnificent Seven' tech stocks. The company's strong performance in data center and AI, coupled with its expanding presence in automotive and enterprise, bodes well for continued growth. As AI adoption accelerates and businesses seek to leverage AI for various applications, nvidia is well-positioned to capitalize on these trends.

However, investors should remain cautious, as potential challenges could impact Nvidia's growth trajectory. Competition from other AI hardware providers, regulatory scrutiny, and macroeconomic fluctuations could all pose challenges to the company's future prospects. Nonetheless, Nvidia's Q1 2025 results have provided a much-needed boost of confidence in the tech sector, and investors will be closely watching the company's next moves.

In conclusion, Nvidia's Q1 2025 earnings report has set the stage for a potential turnaround in the 'Magnificent Seven' tech stocks. The company's strong performance in data center and AI, coupled with its expanding presence in automotive and enterprise, bodes well for continued growth. As AI adoption accelerates and businesses seek to leverage AI for various applications, Nvidia is well-positioned to capitalize on these trends. However, investors should remain cautious, as potential challenges could impact the company's future prospects.

data.title: Cenovus Soars 1.11%: 2025 Production Target Unveiled
Turning Point Brands Boosts Dividend Payout, Reflecting Strong Financial Performance
data.description:
Turning Point Brands (NYSE: TPB), a leading manufacturer and distributor of branded consumer products, has announced a 7% increase in its common stock dividend. The new quarterly dividend of $0.075 per share, payable on April 11, 2025, to shareholders of record as of March 21, 2025, reflects the company's strong financial performance and commitment to returning value to shareholders.

The dividend increase comes on the heels of the company's robust financial performance, with earnings growing by 294.6% over the past year. This growth is a testament to Turning Point Brands' strategic initiatives, including the expansion of alternative distribution channels and FRE (Flavored Reconstituted Extract) product offerings. These initiatives have driven significant revenue increases and enhanced the company's market position.



Turning Point Brands' focus on operational efficiency and net margins has also contributed to its strong financial performance. The company has implemented strategic initiatives such as systematic distributor onboarding and a share repurchase program, which have improved operational efficiency and potential stock valuation gains. By increasing the dividend, the company is acknowledging its shareholders' contribution to its success and encouraging their continued investment in the company.



The dividend increase also reflects Turning Point Brands' commitment to creating shareholder value. By distributing a portion of its earnings to shareholders, the company is acknowledging their contribution to its success and encouraging their continued investment in the company. The dividend increase is a clear indication of the company's confidence in its ability to generate cash flow and maintain a strong financial position.

In conclusion, Turning Point Brands' decision to increase its common stock dividend is a reflection of its strong financial performance, growth strategy, and commitment to shareholder value creation. The company's long-term growth strategy is focused on expanding its product offerings, improving operational efficiency, and creating value for shareholders. By increasing the dividend, the company is demonstrating its confidence in its ability to generate cash flow and maintain a strong financial position.

data.title: SMCI Surges Over 20% Pre-Market as Delisting Fears Ease
data.description:
Super Micro Computer has submitted its audited financial results for Q3 and Q4 of 2024 to comply with Nasdaq listing requirements, alleviating market concerns over a potential delisting.

In pre-market trading, super micro computer surged over 20%. 

However, the company warned that despite submitting financial reports, it still faces many risks and challenges related to its previous delinquency in SEC reporting obligations.

As part of the filing, super micro disclosed that it had identified material weaknesses in its internal controls over financial reporting. These weaknesses included IT system issues, lack of documentation for manual journal entries, and insufficient controls to ensure proper segregation of staff duties. The company stated that it is taking corrective actions, including hiring additional accounting and audit personnel and upgrading its IT systems.

Additionally, in Tuesday's filing, Super Micro stated that a special committee of its Board, which reviewed its financial statements, did not believe that Ernst & Young's resignation was "supported by the facts" examined by the committee.

Notably, Super Micro has built a strong partnership with Nvidia, and at one point, its stock outperformed Nvidia's. With Nvidia set to report earnings after today's U.S. market close, investors are keenly watching whether AI infrastructure demand remains strong— a crucial driver of Super Micro's business.

data.title: Cohu's After-Hours Plunge: Why Investors Are Worried
"Dogecoin, XRP Show Recovery; Remittix Emerges as Rival"
data.description:
Dogecoin and XRP Prices Show Signs of Recovery; Investors Eye Remittix

Despite facing price pressure in the early months of 2025, both Dogecoin (DOGE) and XRP have shown signs of potential recovery, with technical analysis indicating that they may be approaching important support levels. As these prominent cryptocurrencies strive to regain lost ground, investors are turning their attention to Remittix (RTX), a new rival with concrete real-world applications.

In the current market landscape, traders are increasingly seeking cryptocurrencies with practical use cases, as meme coins, AI tokens, and Real World Asset (RWA) projects have collectively lost billions of dollars this year. Remittix, with its innovative Swap-In technology, is establishing itself as a formidable competitor to XRP's long-standing dominance in blockchain-based payments, having raised over $12.8 million in its presale.

Dogecoin (DOGE) has struggled to maintain a consistent upward trend in 2025, with numerous rallies failing to sustain positive momentum. Despite frequent price pumps driven by social media buzz, DOGE has had difficulty maintaining critical levels. Currently trading at $0.2063, Dogecoin has experienced a 9.26% drop in the last 24 hours, despite a significant increase of 130.47% in trading volume.

The bigger challenge for Dogecoin remains its lack of long-term value, which cannot be sustained solely by speculative activity. While it is a popular retail option, DOGE has limited merchant acceptance and no practical financial use beyond tipping and payments. As a result, many former meme coin investors are switching to PayFi tokens like Remittix (RTX), which offer crucial financial services.

XRP, despite its partial legal victory against the SEC in 2023, has seen its price remain stable due to regulatory uncertainty and general market weakness. Similar to DOGE, XRP has experienced a significant increase in trading volume but has struggled to maintain its selling price, which has dipped by 10.09% to $2.22. Analysts believe that XRP may see a short-term rebound of 10-15% if the market stabilizes.

Beyond transient price fluctuations, the cryptocurrency payments industry is evolving.

data.title: "Cardano Midnight & OpenZeppelin Team Up for Privacy-Focused DeFi Framework"
data.description:
The Cardano Midnight Network has inked a strategic deal with OpenZeppelin, a global blockchain security and development startup. These entities plan to introduce a new privacy-focused and compliant framework for Decentralized Finance (DeFi).

The Midnight Network and OpenZeppelin have joined forces to improve the blockchain ecosystem. They aim to achieve this by providing new smart contract development frameworks that support both emerging and existing applications. OpenZeppelin will focus on designing a dedicated smart contract library for this initiative.

This solution is customized to help developers interested in utilizing Midnight’s programmable data protection features. The smart contract library features the complete equivalents of ERC token standards, including ERC20, ERC721, ERC1155, and ERC3643.

The Cardano Midnight Network and OpenZeppelin’s partnership will also usher in a range of starter applications designed to streamline development. This move could trigger a massive boost in the Decentralized Finance ecosystem, strengthening smart contract development and security.

The Cardano ecosystem has been focusing on enhancing interoperability across other networks over the past few months. The Chang hard fork upgrade last year handed over its governance to the community members, establishing decentralized governance. The Plomin hardfork earlier this year complemented the decentralization push, setting an example for its core rivals.

Scalability is mainly at the core of most solutions and upgrades Cardano introduces into its ecosystem. Technologies like Lace wallet, Hydra, Layer-2 rollups, Ouroboros Leios and Peras, Mithril certificates, data API services, and other core node improvements are all designed to help the network achieve its scalability goals this year.

Asset managers like Grayscale Investments have filed for an ADA ETF with the US SEC as part of the growing efforts to create a Cardano ecosystem for everyone. The push for core technology advancement via Midnight Network will make the protocol more attractive to institutional investors. If approved, the Cardano ETF product may complement the onchain enhancements developers bring to the network.

data.title: "Fluence Launches DePIN Pledge: Web3 Giants Commit to Decentralized Infrastructure"
data.description:
Fluence, a trailblazing platform specializing in cloudless computing, has introduced the DePIN Pledge, an initiative aimed at accelerating the adoption of decentralized infrastructure in the Web3 ecosystem. Backed by leading DePIN firms, this pledge encourages Web3 projects and crypto companies to publicly commit to using Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks (DePIN) solutions.

The DePIN Pledge has launched with the support of prominent companies such as Consensys, Polygon, Helium, Gelato, Impossible Cloud Network, IoTEX, Infura, Spheron, BlockScout, Pocket Network, Outlier Ventures, NodeOps, IO.NET, OpenMesh, NuNet, RapidNode, AnyType, iExec, Aleph Cloud, Heurist, Derad Network, and more.

As the Web3 and crypto ecosystems continue to grow, decentralization has often remained an ideal rather than a reality. The persistent challenge lies in the ongoing dependence on centralized infrastructure, such as cloud hyperscalers, which hinders the true potential of decentralization. With the DePIN ecosystem maturing, it is time for Web3 and crypto companies to move beyond conversations about decentralization and fully implement it within their infrastructure.

Tom Trowbridge, Co-Founder & CEO of Fluence, expressed his enthusiasm about the launch of the DePIN Pledge, stating, "We are at the very beginning of DePIN adoption, and in the coming years, we expect to see a wide range of DePIN products and services used by all kinds of projects and companies. We are happy to help advance this important movement by highlighting all of the businesses improving their operations through DePIN."

The DePIN Pledge is a rallying call for projects, communities, and individuals to embrace decentralized infrastructure and build transparent, resilient ecosystems. In an age where AI and blockchain are transforming industries, decentralization is no longer a choice but a necessity. AI's ever-growing demand for compute power and data strengthens the grip of centralized control, threatening security, privacy, and equitable access. The DePIN Pledge envisions a future where critical systems are independent, free from centralized authority, and designed to empower individuals and communities.

Those who commit to this vision will receive a manifesto outlining the principles of DePIN adoption, a DePIN Pledge NFT symbolizing their dedication

data.title: Best Wallet's Multi-Chain Upgrade: A Game Changer for Bitcoin's Future
data.description:
Best Wallet Completes Multi-Chain Upgrade, Sparking Speculation on Bitcoin's Future

In a significant development, Best Wallet has successfully completed a multi-chain upgrade, raising expectations for the future of cryptocurrency transactions and investments. This upgrade allows users to seamlessly interact with multiple blockchains, enhancing the versatility and functionality of the wallet.

The upgrade comes at a time when the cryptocurrency market is experiencing rapid growth and increased adoption. Bitcoin, the world's leading cryptocurrency, has seen a surge in interest from both retail and institutional investors. As the market evolves, so too must the tools used to manage and trade these digital assets.

Best Wallet's multi-chain upgrade is a testament to the company's commitment to innovation and adaptability. By enabling users to interact with multiple blockchains, the wallet is positioned to become a leading platform for cryptocurrency transactions in the coming years. This upgrade could also pave the way for increased interoperability between different blockchains, further enhancing the potential of the cryptocurrency ecosystem.

As the cryptocurrency market continues to grow, so too does the demand for user-friendly and secure platforms. Best Wallet's multi-chain upgrade is a significant step towards meeting this demand. By offering a seamless and secure experience for users, the wallet is well-positioned to become the go-to platform for cryptocurrency transactions in the future.

While it is too early to definitively say that Best Wallet is the best app to buy Bitcoin in 2025, the company's commitment to innovation and adaptability bodes well for its future prospects. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, so too will the tools used to manage and trade these digital assets. Best Wallet's multi-chain upgrade is a clear indication that the company is committed to staying at the forefront of this rapidly changing landscape.

data.title: Curbline Properties Boosts Dividend to $0.16 for First Quarter 2025
data.description:
Curbline Properties Corp. (CURB), a leading owner and manager of convenience retail properties in the United States, has announced an increase in its common stock dividend for the first quarter of 2025. The new dividend, amounting to $0.16 per share, represents a significant boost from the previous year's dividend of $0.25 per share. This move underscores the company's commitment to shareholder returns and its strong financial position.



Curbline Properties' decision to increase its dividend can be attributed to several key factors that align with the company's long-term growth strategy. Firstly, the company's robust financial health, as indicated by its high financial health score of 6/6, allows it to distribute a larger portion of its earnings to shareholders. This strong financial position is further supported by the company's low debt/equity ratio of 0% and high gross margin of 77.17%. Additionally, Curbline Properties' revenue growth of 29.1% over the past year demonstrates the company's ability to generate substantial cash flows, enabling it to maintain and even increase its dividend payments.



Moreover, Curbline Properties' focus on shareholder returns is evident in its Rewards section, which highlights the company's trading at 31.7% below its estimated fair value. This suggests that the company is committed to returning capital to shareholders through dividends and other means, ultimately supporting the company's long-term growth.

However, investors should also consider the potential risks associated with Curbline Properties' dividend increase. While the company's high financial health score and revenue growth are encouraging, the lower dividend yield compared to other REITs in the industry may indicate higher risk or a focus on growth opportunities. Additionally, the company's P/E ratio of 258x suggests a higher valuation compared to the sector average, which could imply greater sensitivity to changes in earnings and potential volatility.

In conclusion, Curbline Properties' decision to increase its dividend to $0.16 per share for the first quarter of 2025 reflects the company's strong financial position and commitment to shareholder returns. While the lower dividend yield compared to other REITs may suggest higher risk or a focus on growth, investors should carefully evaluate the company's financial performance and long-term growth prospects before making an investment decision.

data.title: Dingdong's After-Hours Plunge: Total Return's Surprise
How Has NVIDIA's Stock Performed After Earnings Reports in the Past Five Years?
data.description:
NVIDIA, hailed as the world's most important stock and the leading force in AI, is set to release its fourth - quarter earnings report after the U.S. stock market closes on Wednesday. As DeepSeek makes an impact on U.S. stocks and Microsoft is reported to be vacating data centers, the global spotlight is on NVIDIA. Wall Street is holding its breath, wondering whether the company can single - handedly turn the tide or accelerate the downward trend of U.S. stocks.

According to institutional estimates, NVIDIA's Q4 revenue is expected to reach $38.2 billion, a 73% year - over - year increase; the adjusted net profit is expected to be $20.95 billion, a 63% year - over - year increase. In the past 18 quarters, NVIDIA has exceeded Wall Street expectations in 16 quarters. However, the revenue growth rate this time may be the lowest in seven quarters, indicating that the growth curve is slowing down. Meanwhile, while beating expectations may be anticipated, what Wall Street is more eager to know is by how much and whether there will be any surprises. As the world's most important stock, investors' expectations are at their peak.

In addition, Jensen Huang's remarks during the conference call and the company's future guidance will also be the market's focal points. To some extent, they represent the future growth prospects of AI, especially after the impact of DeepSeek. For Jensen Huang, DeepSeek is definitely a topic that cannot be avoided during the earnings call.

For traders, NVIDIA's earnings report will not only have an impact on its own stock price but also bring significant volatility to the market. Options traders expect NVIDIA's stock price to experience a 7.7% fluctuation after the earnings announcement, which is equivalent to a massive market volatility of approximately $280 billion. Based on historical performance, NVIDIA's stock price has shown significant volatility after earnings releases. In the past five years, there has been a 55% probability of the stock price rising on the single day after the earnings announcement (with a median increase of 4.9%), and the probability of an increase in the past three years is nearly 60%.

data.title: What's Behind the Latest Sell-Off in Stocks and Bitcoin?
data.description:
Recently, the U.S. market has been turbulent, with significant drops happening in the stock market and Bitcoin, so what's actually behind this wave of sell-offs?

Last week, prominent investors like Steve cohen and Warren Buffett issued warnings toward the market. Cohen expressed a negative outlook on the U.S. economy and predicted a significant correction in the stock market. Notably, this is his first bearish stance since Trump implemented aggressive trade policies.

Similarly, Buffett's berkshire hathaway has been selling stocks for nine consecutive quarters, with cash reserves reaching a record $3342 billion, an all-time high. Buffett warned in his shareholder letter that fiscal folly could destroy currencies.

The pessimistic forecasts from these investment giants have undoubtedly sounded the alarm for the market. Subsequently, U.S. stocks have continued to fall, Bitcoin has plummeted, and panic has spread across the market.

The warnings from these leaders are not without basis, as the market has reacted violently. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq have both experienced four consecutive days of declines, with the Nasdaq dropping about 5% during this period. Popular themes such as long-term growth, AI stocks, and election stocks have been under continuous pressure.

The Magnificent Seven have lost $1.5 trillion in market cap this year, with a drop of over $900 billion in the past week. Meanwhile, the cryptocurrency market has not been spared. Bitcoin prices fell 6% to $88,245 on Tuesday, the lowest since November last year.

More worryingly, even a rate cut (the U.S. 10-year Treasury yield fell to about 4.29%) has not provided any relief for stocks and long-term bonds. Peter Callahan, a top TMT trader at Goldman Sachs, described Wednesday as another uncomfortable day.

The VIX, or fear index, has risen back to its year-to-date high, with the market moving from record highs to extreme fear in just five days.

The recent sell-off in stocks, cryptocurrencies, and most risk assets can be attributed to several main reasons.

First is the retreat of retail investors. The shift in Trump's policy focus has accelerated capital withdrawal. Matt Reiner, chief cash trader at J.P. Morgan, suggested that bank stocks, cryptocurrencies, and other assets considered retail investment targets surged after the election due to expectations of deregulation. However, as the Trump administration focuses on immigration, tariffs, and DOGE, this excitement is rapidly fading, leading to a significant withdrawal of retail funds.

Among them, momentum stocks have been hit hard. Goldman Sachs data shows that Fins MOMO (financial momentum stocks) have fallen 9% in the past few trading sessions. TMT MOMO (technology, media, and telecom momentum stocks) have fallen about 19% from their 52-week highs, close to the 15-20% pullback levels seen in the past two years. Momo refers to the momentum investment strategy, which involves chasing stocks that have performed strongly recently.

Meme stocks (GSXUMEME INDEX) have also fallen for five consecutive days.

Further, while retail investors seem to be at the center of the recent crisis, hedge funds are also showing signs of capitulation, forced to reduce positions due to losses in peripheral investments.

Chloe Garber, an analyst at Goldman Sachs, also pointed out that recent hedge fund position reductions have exacerbated a negative feedback loop.

Additionally, CTA's (Commodity Trading Advisor) short-term momentum is negative, and there is a significant supply of U.S. stocks that need to be sold by the end of this week. If medium-term momentum turns negative, the supply could grow to over $20 billion.

Further, Nvidia (NVDA) is set to release its earnings report this week, but holdings in ultra-large-cap growth stocks and tech stocks remain at very high levels (97th percentile), far above what earnings growth implies. Any earnings miss could trigger further sell-offs.

Currently, the market is looking for incremental buyers. With both CTAs and L/S (hedge funds) selling, the question is when and where confidence and support will reappear in the market. Reiner believes that Wednesday was certainly not the most painful day, and the adjustment may only be one-third to halfway through, with more room to go, making it hard to say the market has bottomed out.

data.title: "Crypto Market Turmoil: Bitcoin's Retreat, Memecoin Frenzy, and Bullish Signs Emerge"
data.description:
Despite recent market volatility, a glass-half-full perspective reveals several positive indicators and developments in the crypto and broader financial landscape.

Bitcoin, the world's largest cryptocurrency, has retreated from its all-time high reached last month, with US bitcoin ETFs experiencing record outflows. However, this downturn is not isolated to the crypto market, as stocks have also seen red. Nevertheless, a rebound could be on the horizon, as the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite indexes remained relatively stable despite Bitcoin's decline.

21Shares crypto research strategist Matt Mena suggests that bull markets peak under specific conditions, such as excessive leverage, retail euphoria, and falling Bitcoin dominance, rather than compressed funding rates. He argues that liquidations reset overleveraged positions, creating healthier uptrends as traders re-enter the market post-shakeout.

The memecoin token frenzy, exemplified by tokens like $TRUMP, aligns with mid-cycle speculation patterns observed in 2020-2021. Blockworks' Katherine Ross notes that recent token launches have contributed to the larger exhaustion in the market. However, Bitwise research head ryan Rasmussen counters this perspective, highlighting the potential for a market recovery.

Mena also points out that the M2 money supply has been growing since mid-January, and quantitative tightening may soon reach a natural end. Additionally, the Pi Cycle Top Indicator, which tracks Bitcoin's 111-day simple moving average against a 2x multiple of the 350-day SMA, has not yet signaled a market peak.

LMAX Group's Joel Kruger argues that correlations between Bitcoin and traditional risk assets can be misleading, as Bitcoin can generate significant demand as an attractive portfolio diversification asset. He believes there is formidable support for Bitcoin in the $70,000-$75,000 zone, which should serve as an attractive higher low ahead of the next major upside extension and bullish continuation to a fresh record high beyond $110,000.

Last week's Bybit hack is unlikely to have a major impact on institutional confidence in centralized exchanges, according to YouHodler markets chief Ruslan Lienkha. He believes that institutions typically adhere to strict treasury management rules and allocate only the necessary liquidity to CEXs for routine transactions, while large-scale institutional trades are

data.title: Bonk vs. Dogecoin vs. Pepe: Crypto Meme Coin Showdown in 2025
data.description:
As the crypto market grapples with a significant downturn on February 25, 2025, investors are speculating on the potential of Bonk (BONK) to outperform its meme coin rivals, Dogecoin (DOGE) and Pepe (PEPE), by 2025. Despite the market's bearish sentiment, Bonk is trading at $0.00001295 with a market cap of $1 billion, while Dogecoin clings to $0.20 after a 12% plunge. PEPE, meanwhile, sits at $0.00002052, down but not out.

Dogecoin, the original crypto meme, has maintained value above $0.2 with a $30 billion market capitalization. However, it has experienced a 12% price fall in 24 hours, with a circulating supply of 148 billion coins and a daily trading volume of $3.55 billion. Dogecoin's unlimited supply and meme roots make it a wild card in the uncertain 2025 market.

Bonk, the Solana-based pup, is trading at $0.000013 with a $1 billion market cap and 74.2 trillion coins in circulation. It's down 9% in the last day but has seen massive trading activity with a daily volume of $205 million. Bonk's integration into 118 Solana dApps and a recent Bonk API hookup with Bungee Exchange have kept it relevant. Analysts are split on Bonk's price prediction, with some seeing a 20x-25x moonshot by the bull market's end and others eyeing $0.000042 by March 2025 if FOMO kicks in, though a dip to $0.000009 looms if hype fades.

On February 23, 2025, PEPE was trading at $0.000008, holding steady near a critical support zone. A falling wedge pattern on the four-hour chart has broken out, hinting at a potential bullish move with technical indicators like the Average Directional Index at 27.95 signaling a developing trend and the Relative

data.title: "Safe Admits Developer Machine Compromise in $1.4B Bybit Hack, CZ Demands Clarity"
data.description:
Safe, the developer of the SafeWallet multisignature product used by Bybit, has released a post-mortem update following the recent hack that resulted in a $1.4 billion loss. The update revealed that the root cause of the incident was a compromised developer machine. However, this announcement has drawn criticism from Binance co-founder Changpeng "CZ" Zhao.

According to Safe, the forensic review did not find any vulnerabilities in the Safe smart contracts or the code of its front-end portal and services. Instead, the compromised machine was modified to target the Bybit Safe and divert transactions to a different hardware wallet. Martin Köppelmann, the co-founder of the Gnosis blockchain network, which developed Safe, noted that the hackers managed to trick multiple signers into approving the malicious transaction.

CZ criticized the update, stating that it used vague language to brush over the issues. He asked for clarification on several points, including how the hackers accessed Bybit's systems, how they tricked multiple signers, and why they did not target other addresses. Köppelmann speculated that the threat actors did not target other addresses to prevent discovery and detection.

A forensic review conducted by Sygnia and Verichains revealed that the credentials of a Safe developer were compromised, allowing the attacker to gain unauthorized access to the Safe infrastructure and deceive signers into approving a malicious transaction.

Meanwhile, onchain data shows that the Lazarus Group has transferred 45,900 Ether (ETH), valued at approximately $113 million, in the last 24 hours. This brings the total amount of funds laundered to over 135,000 ETH, valued at roughly $335 million. Analyst EmberCN estimates that the Lazarus Group will likely have "cleaned up" the funds within 8-10 days. Bybit and blockchain analytics firm Elliptic have tracked the stolen crypto to over 11,000 wallets controlled by the Lazarus Group, and Elliptic has published a data feed of addresses associated with the hacker group to help market participants stay clear of those wallet addresses and prevent money laundering.
